rationale: Section 31.032 governs installment payment timing for disaster-damaged property taxes. It references residence homestead status but not any specific exemption dollar amount, so raising the §11.13(b) exemption requires no change here.
quote: A person may pay a taxing unit's taxes imposed on property that the person owns in four equal installments without penalty or interest if the first installment is paid before the delinquency date
_note: No cross-reference to §11.13(b) or any exemption dollar figure appears in §31.032.
